goal: 调查并实现 fork PR contribution intent 在 Mainline Hub 中的外部导入展示

summary.title: 让 Hub 显示 fork PR 外部贡献
summary.what: 新增 Hub external_contributions JSON DTO 与导出输入，支持通过 --external-contributions 显式导入 GitHub fork PR metadata，在 dashboard/search/data JSON 中展示 contributor、PR、merge commit、provenance、importer 与 not-author-sealed/unverified trust 标记，并把记录关联到同一 merge commit 上已有的 upstream Mainline intent。
summary.why: upstream 只有 maintainer actor log 时，Hub 只能看到 Mainline actor intent，无法解释已 merge fork PR 的原作者贡献。这个切片让 Hub 能说明外部贡献来源，同时不把 GitHub PR metadata 冒充成 contributor 自己 sealed 的 Mainline intent。
summary.user_goal: 调查并实现 fork PR contribution intent 在 Mainline Hub 中的外部导入展示

decisions.point: fork contributor intent 如何进入 upstream Hub view
decisions.chose: 先实现选项 B 的最小可验证切片：显式导入 GitHub PR metadata 为 Hub-only external contribution。
decisions.rationale: 它能解释当前 PR #56 类问题，并避免在没有 fetch/accept fork actor refs 的 trust flow 前把外部作者元数据当成可信 actor log。
rejected: 本次直接实现 fork actor ref fetch/accept
把 GitHub PR body 的空 Mainline Intent 模板解析为真实 intent

decisions.point: external contribution 是否进入 MainlineView.Intents
decisions.chose: 不进入 Intents，只作为 HubModel.ExternalContributions 展示。
decisions.rationale: 这样 actor count、review queue、coverage、pin 和 conflict logic 仍只由 actor logs + notes 驱动。

decisions.chose: 导入时强制 author_sealed=false、not_author_sealed=true、verified=false，并展示 provenance/body_intent_note/imported_by。
decisions.rationale: 读者能区分 github_pr_imported/inferred metadata 与 contributor-authored sealed intent。

rejected.alternative: 选项 A：本次支持 upstream 显式 fetch/accept fork actor refs
rejected.reason: 需要独立的 transport、accept、verification 与 UI trust flow，超出最小 Hub 解释切片。

rejected.alternative: 把 PR body 的 ## Mainline Intent 作为导入来源
rejected.reason: PR body 是 review-time artifact，且已知空模板明确不应被解析为真实 intent。

review_notes: Targeted verification passed: go test ./internal/hub -count=1; go test ./internal/cli -count=1; go test ./internal/engine -run 'TestCoverage|TestPin|TestReconcile|TestPRDescription|TestPRComment' -count=1; git diff --check; CLI smoke with go run . --no-sync hub export --external-contributions verified data/intents.json, index.html, and search_index.json.

Full go test ./... was attempted twice and did not complete: default 10m and explicit -timeout=20m both timed out in internal/engine TestPropertyRevertNoteShape PBT, outside this Hub/import change path.

architectural_claims: External PR contributions are Hub interpretation-layer records, not Mainline actor intents.
Actor sealed intents, coverage, pinning, review queue, and conflict checks continue to derive from actor logs and notes.
behavioral_changes: mainline hub export/open accepts --external-contributions JSON input.
Hub dashboard and data JSON can display imported fork PR contribution metadata with provenance and trust labels.
Hub search index includes external contributions as a separate result type.

api_changes.signature: mainline hub export --external-contributions <file.json>; mainline hub open --external-contributions <file.json>

data_model_changes.name: HubModel.external_contributions / HubExternalContribution
data_model_changes.migration_notes: omitempty field; existing Hub exports remain readable.

security_implications: Untrusted imported GitHub metadata is labeled as not author-sealed and unverified; no remote fetch or actor trust elevation is performed.
